map.title: Events map
organizer.emptyText: This organizer hasn't published any events yet.
about.lead: Shodumo is a listing of Lviv micro-events. We help you find small local happenings: morning runs, wine tastings, workshops, gigs and neighborhood markets — and join them easily.
about.howText: Organizers publish events through our API, and you find them in the feed or on the map, save your favorites and mark that you're going. It's all free for attendees.
about.orgText: Want people to hear about your event? Shodumo is built API-first — get in touch to request organizer access.
